name: FormField
description: Wraps form controls (Input, Dropdown, ComboBox, etc.) to provide labels, helper text, and validation status. The primary building block for accessible forms.

id.description: Optional id suffix used to derive label/helper text ids.

labelId.description: Explicit id used for FormFieldLabel association.

helperTextId.description: Explicit id used for FormFieldHelperText association.

labelPlacement.description: Controls label position relative to the wrapped control.

validationStatus.description: Field validation state propagated to compatible wrapped controls.

necessity.description: Displays necessity indicator and drives required semantics.

disabled.description: Disables the field and compatible wrapped controls.

readOnly.description: Sets read-only state on compatible wrapped controls.

children.description: Typically FormFieldLabel, one or more controls, and optional FormFieldHelperText.

FormFieldLabel.description: Renders the accessible label for the form control

FormFieldHelperText.description: Renders supplementary text below the control (hints, validation messages)

keyboard: Tab — moves focus to the wrapped control
aria: aria-labelledby — automatically links FormFieldLabel to the control
aria-describedby — automatically links FormFieldHelperText to the control
aria-required — set when necessity is 'required' or 'asterisk'
